[2025-05-13 08:46:10] NEW MESSAGES:

SimpleCoder: 
import argparse

def convert_text(input_text=None, file_path=None, case='lower'):
    if file_path:
        with open(file_path, 'r') as file:
            text = file.read()
    else:
        text = input_text

    if case == 'upper':
        return text.upper()
    elif case == 'lower':
        return text.lower()
    elif case == 'title':
        return text.title()
    elif case == 'sentence':
        return '. '.join(sentence.capitalize() for sentence in text.split('. '))
    else:
        return text

def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description='Convert text to various cases.')
    parser.add_argument('-i', '--input', type=str, help='Input text to convert.')
    parser.add_argument('-f', '--file', type=str, help='File path to read text from.')
    parser.add_argument('-c', '--case', type=str, choices=['upper', 'lower', 'title', 'sentence'], default='lower', help='Case to convert text to. Options: upper, lower, title, sentence.')
    args = parser.parse_args()

    if not args.input and not args.file:
        print("Please provide an input text or a file path.")
        return

    result = convert_text(input_text=args.input, file_path=args.file, case=args.case)
    print(result)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

[2025-05-13 08:46:17] NEW MESSAGES:

SimpleTester: 
import pytest
from your_module import convert_text  # Assuming the function is in a module named your_module

def test_uppercase_conversion():
    assert convert_text(input_text="hello world", case='upper') == "HELLO WORLD"

def test_lowercase_conversion():
    assert convert_text(input_text="HELLO WORLD", case='lower') == "hello world"

def test_titlecase_conversion():
    assert convert_text(input_text="hello world", case='title') == "Hello World"

def test_sentencecase_conversion():
    assert convert_text(input_text="hello world. it's a beautiful day.", case='sentence') == "Hello world. It's a beautiful day."

def test_file_input_conversion(tmp_path):
    # Create a temporary file to test file input
    d = tmp_path / "sub"
    d.mkdir()
    p = d / "hello.txt"
    p.write_text("hello world from file")
    assert convert_text(file_path=str(p), case='upper') == "HELLO WORLD FROM FILE"

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
